name: Death Pact Yet Again
description:
Bro there were like 0 bots on Death Pact Yet Again I think so I made this.

My 3rd bot overall, my 3rd BFDI or Object Show bot

Similar to how there were no Team 2 bots, so after that I wanted to make DPYA and maybe the other bots like CloudYAY or BAGGED or the notes or whatever.

No hate pls I just wanted to make bots and making them public if I want to
